controls.control_objective: To ensure issue directions to authorised persons through a
controls.control_description: It may be noted that, whenever necessary, Reserve Bank shall issue directions to Authorised Persons through A.P.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue directions to authorised persons through a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be amended suitably simultaneously
controls.control_description: The Master Direction issued herewith shall be amended suitably simultaneously.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be amended suitably simultaneously

controls.control_objective: To ensure 03, 2000 and 12(r)/2015-rb, dated december 29, 2015, as amended from time to time
controls.control_description:
Introduction
Life insurance and general insurance business in India can be undertaken by insurance
companies registered with Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority (IRDA)
and as per the regulations notified by Reserve Bank of India under Notification
No.1/2000-RB dated May 03, 2000 and 12(R)/2015-RB, dated December 29, 2015, as
amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 03, 2000 and 12(r)/2015-rb, dated december 29, 2015, as amended from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure take or continue to hold a health insurance policy issued by an insurer outside india provided aggregate remittance including amount of premium does n
controls.control_description:
i) A person resident in India may take or continue to hold a health insurance policy
issued by an insurer outside India provided aggregate remittance including
amount of premium does not exceed the limits prescribed by RBI under the
Liberalised Remittance Scheme (LRS) from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to take or continue to hold a health insurance policy issued by an insurer outside india provided aggregate remittance including amount of premium does n

controls.control_objective: To ensure take or continue to hold general/health insurance policies from insurers outside india subject to irdai guidelines and central government rules provid
controls.control_description:
ii) Units located in SEZs may take or continue to hold general/health insurance
policies from insurers outside India subject to IRDAI Guidelines and Central
Government rules provided the premium is paid by the units out of their foreign
exchange balances.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to take or continue to hold general/health insurance policies from insurers outside india subject to irdai guidelines and central government rules provid

controls.control_objective: To ensure take out or renew any policy of insurance in respect of any property in india or any ship or other vessel or aircraft registered in india with an insu
controls.control_description:
iii) No person shall take out or renew any policy of insurance in respect of any
property in India or any ship or other vessel or aircraft registered in India with an
insurer whose principal place of business is outside India without permission of
Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India (IRDAI).
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to take out or renew any policy of insurance in respect of any property in india or any ship or other vessel or aircraft registered in india with an insu

controls.control_objective: To ensure the policy is held under a specific or general permission of the reserve bank of india
controls.control_description:
(i) A person resident in India may take or continue to hold a life insurance policy
issued by an insurer outside India, provided that the policy is held under a
specific or general permission of the Reserve Bank of India.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to the policy is held under a specific or general permission of the reserve bank of india

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to hold any life insurance policy issued by an insurer outside india when such person was resident outside india
controls.control_description:
(ii) A person resident in India may continue to hold any life insurance policy issued
by an insurer outside India when such person was resident outside India.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to continue to hold any life insurance policy issued by an insurer outside india when such person was resident outside india

controls.control_objective: To ensure repatriate to india through normal banking channels, the maturity proceeds or amount of any claim due on the policy, within a period of seven days fro
controls.control_description:
If the
premium due on a life insurance policy has been paid by making remittance from
India, the policy holder shall repatriate to India through normal banking channels,
the maturity proceeds or amount of any claim due on the policy, within a period of
seven days from the receipt thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to repatriate to india through normal banking channels, the maturity proceeds or amount of any claim due on the policy, within a period of seven days fro

controls.control_objective: To ensure the indian insurance companies as defined in section 3(9) of the insurance laws (amendment) act, 2015 and registered with insurance regulatory and dev
controls.control_description:
(ii) "Insurers" means the Indian Insurance Companies as defined in Section
3(9) of The Insurance Laws (Amendment) Act, 2015 and registered with
Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India (IRDAI) to carry
out general/health insurance/reinsurance business in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the indian insurance companies as defined in section 3(9) of the insurance laws (amendment) act, 2015 and registered with insurance regulatory and dev

controls.control_objective: To ensure and includes payment of premium in foreign exchange and/or payment of premium in inr derived by sale of foreign exchange to an authorised dealer or an
controls.control_description:
Payment of premium in foreign exchange means and includes payment of
premium in foreign exchange and/or payment of premium in INR derived by sale
of foreign exchange to an authorised dealer or an authorised money-changer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to and includes payment of premium in foreign exchange and/or payment of premium in inr derived by sale of foreign exchange to an authorised dealer or an

controls.control_objective: To ensure be insisted upon at the time of accepting payment
controls.control_description:
Appropriate documentary evidence may be insisted upon at the time of accepting
payment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be insisted upon at the time of accepting payment

controls.control_objective: To ensure take general/health insurance policy permitted by irdai from indian insurer on payment of premium in inr
controls.control_description:
3.3 General/ Health Insurance policies by Indian Residents
Resident of India may take general/health insurance policy permitted by IRDAI
from Indian insurer on payment of premium in INR, where claims arising under
the policies outside India are to be settled in foreign currency.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to take general/health insurance policy permitted by irdai from indian insurer on payment of premium in inr

controls.control_objective: To ensure take general/health insurance policy as permitted by irdai from indian insurers
controls.control_description:
Resident outside India may take general/health insurance policy as permitted by
IRDAI from Indian Insurers.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to take general/health insurance policy as permitted by irdai from indian insurers

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued only in inr
controls.control_description:
However, Insurance cover on risks inside India (including
All Risks Insurance) on assets in India owned by Indian branches/offices of
foreign companies, banks, etc., may be issued only in INR.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued only in inr

controls.control_objective: To ensure be freely made in inr
controls.control_description:
Payment of claims to such persons against
general/health insurance policies may be freely made in INR.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be freely made in inr

controls.control_objective: To ensure allow foreign currency remittance for claims under irdai permitted general/ health insurance policies issued by indian insurers where settlement of cl
controls.control_description:
Banks may allow foreign currency remittance for claims under IRDAI
permitted general/ health insurance policies issued by Indian insurers where
settlement of claims is assured in foreign currency subject to following conditions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to allow foreign currency remittance for claims under irdai permitted general/ health insurance policies issued by indian insurers where settlement of cl

controls.control_objective: To ensure be settled in inr equivalent of foreign currency due
controls.control_description:
For resident beneficiaries the claim may be
settled in INR equivalent of foreign currency due.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be settled in inr equivalent of foreign currency due

controls.control_objective: To ensure be paid in appropriate foreign currency
controls.control_description:
viii) Claims arising outside India against policies issued under Employers'
Liability Act and Merchant Shipping Act may be paid in appropriate
foreign currency.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be paid in appropriate foreign currency

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed to the hospital which has provided the treatment/third party administrator with which the insurer or the hospital has entered into a contra
controls.control_description:
ix) In case of cashless international health insurance products remittances
may be allowed to the hospital which has provided the treatment/Third
Party Administrator with which the insurer or the hospital has entered
into a contractual arrangement in accordance with applicable IRDAI
regulations or to the insured person resident outside India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed to the hospital which has provided the treatment/third party administrator with which the insurer or the hospital has entered into a contra

controls.control_objective: To ensure allow remittances falling due under such approved reinsurance arrangements by the insurers in accordance with the terms and conditions laid down by th
controls.control_description:
Authorised dealer, designated by these insurers may allow
remittances falling due under such approved reinsurance arrangements by the
insurers in accordance with the terms and conditions laid down by their Boards.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to allow remittances falling due under such approved reinsurance arrangements by the insurers in accordance with the terms and conditions laid down by th

controls.control_objective: To ensure remit the premium through the branch of the authorised dealer designated by the insurer in terms of para 9 above subject to the production of undernot
controls.control_description:
3.8 Remittance of Reinsurance Premium by IRDAI licensed brokers
Wherever IRDAI licensed brokers arrange the reinsurance on behalf of insurers,
brokers may remit the premium through the branch of the authorised dealer
designated by the insurer in terms of para 9 above subject to the production of
undernoted documents:
i) Relative debit notes from overseas insurance company and/or Broker.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to remit the premium through the branch of the authorised dealer designated by the insurer in terms of para 9 above subject to the production of undernot

controls.control_objective: To ensure open, hold and maintain with a bank outside india foreign currency accounts for facilitating transactions and expenses relating/incidental to general/
controls.control_description:
3.9 Foreign Currency Accounts Abroad
Insurers may open, hold and maintain with a bank outside India foreign
currency accounts for facilitating transactions and expenses relating/incidental
to general/health insurance / reinsurance business undertaken in foreign
countries in accordance with regulations laid down.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to open, hold and maintain with a bank outside india foreign currency accounts for facilitating transactions and expenses relating/incidental to general/

controls.control_objective: To ensure endeavour to keep in their foreign currency accounts only the minimum balances required for normal business and transfer to india regularly all surplu
controls.control_description:
Insurers should
endeavour to keep in their foreign currency accounts only the minimum
balances required for normal business and transfer to India regularly all
surplus funds held at foreign centres.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to endeavour to keep in their foreign currency accounts only the minimum balances required for normal business and transfer to india regularly all surplu

controls.control_objective: To ensure invest freely, out of their funds abroad, without prior approval of reserve bank of india subject to the following conditions:
controls.control_description:
3.10 Investments Abroad
General/health insurers may invest freely, out of their funds abroad, without
prior approval of Reserve Bank of India subject to the following conditions:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to invest freely, out of their funds abroad, without prior approval of reserve bank of india subject to the following conditions:

controls.control_objective: To ensure a person resident outside india who is registered as an overseas citizen of india cardholder under section 7(a) of the citizenship act, 1955
controls.control_description:
ii) 'Overseas Citizen of India (OCI)' means a person resident outside India who
is registered as an Overseas Citizen of India Cardholder under Section 7(A)
of the Citizenship Act, 1955.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a person resident outside india who is registered as an overseas citizen of india cardholder under section 7(a) of the citizenship act, 1955

controls.control_objective: To ensure a person resident in india for employment of a specified duration (irrespective of length thereof) or for a specific job or assignment, the duration o
controls.control_description:
iii) 'Not permanently resident' means a person resident in India for employment
of a specified duration (irrespective of length thereof) or for a specific job or
assignment, the duration of which does not exceed three years.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a person resident in india for employment of a specified duration (irrespective of length thereof) or for a specific job or assignment, the duration o

controls.control_objective: To ensure life insurers registered with insurance regulatory and development authority of india (irdai) to carry out life insurance business in india
controls.control_description:
iv) "Insurer in India" means Life insurers registered with Insurance Regulatory
and Development Authority of India (IRDAI) to carry out Life insurance
business in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to life insurers registered with insurance regulatory and development authority of india (irdai) to carry out life insurance business in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued in foreign currency to resident persons of indian nationality or overseas citizens of india who have returned to india after being resident outside india
controls.control_description:
(i) Policies may be issued in foreign currency to resident persons of Indian
nationality or overseas citizens of India who have returned to India after
being resident outside India, provided the premium are paid out of
remittances from foreign currency funds held by them abroad or from their
Resident Foreign Currency (RFC) account with authorised dealers in
India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued in foreign currency to resident persons of indian nationality or overseas citizens of india who have returned to india after being resident outside india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued to foreign nationals not permanently resident in india provided the premium is paid out of foreign currency funds or from their income earne
controls.control_description:
(ii) Policies denominated in foreign currency or rupees may be issued to
foreign nationals not permanently resident in India provided the premium
is paid out of foreign currency funds or from their income earned in India
or repatriable superannuation/ pension fund in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued to foreign nationals not permanently resident in india provided the premium is paid out of foreign currency funds or from their income earne

controls.control_objective: To ensure issue policies denominated in foreign currency through their offices in india or abroad to residents outside india provided the premium are collected
controls.control_description:
(i) Insurer in India may issue policies denominated in foreign currency through
their offices in India or abroad to residents outside India provided the
premium are collected in foreign currency from abroad or out of
NRE/FCNR accounts of the insured or his family members held in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue policies denominated in foreign currency through their offices in india or abroad to residents outside india provided the premium are collected

controls.control_objective: To ensure be transferred to indian register, together with the actuarial reserves held against the policies, on the policy holders' return to india
controls.control_description:
(iii) Policies issued to Indian nationals and overseas citizens of India resident
abroad by overseas offices of Insurer in India may be transferred to Indian
register, together with the actuarial reserves held against the policies, on
the policy holders' return to India.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be transferred to indian register, together with the actuarial reserves held against the policies, on the policy holders' return to india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be converted into rupee policies except in cases where the policy has been in force for at least 3 years prior to policy holder's return to india and
controls.control_description:
Foreign currency policies in such
circumstances shall be converted into rupee policies except in cases where
the policy has been in force for at least 3 years prior to policy holder's
return to India and the policy holder wishes to retain and continue the
foreign currency policy.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be converted into rupee policies except in cases where the policy has been in force for at least 3 years prior to policy holder's return to india and

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted by authorised dealers provided the policy holder undertakes to repatriate to india the maturity proceeds or any claim amounts due on the
controls.control_description:
Requests received for payment in foreign currency
towards premium on such policies may be permitted by authorised dealers
provided the policy holder undertakes to repatriate to India the maturity
proceeds or any claim amounts due on the policy through normal banking
channels with in a period of seven days from the receipt thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be permitted by authorised dealers provided the policy holder undertakes to repatriate to india the maturity proceeds or any claim amounts due on the

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to credit the same to nre/fcnr account
controls.control_description:
(ii)

Residents outside India who are beneficiaries of insurance
claims/maturity/surrender value settled in foreign currency may be permitted
to credit the same to NRE/FCNR account, if they so desire.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to credit the same to nre/fcnr account

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to open and credit the proceeds thereof to their rfc (domestic) account
controls.control_description:
(iii) (a) Resident beneficiaries of the insurance claims/ maturity/ surrender value
settled in foreign currency may be permitted to open and credit the
proceeds thereof to their RFC (Domestic) Account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to open and credit the proceeds thereof to their rfc (domestic) account

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to credit the proceeds to the rfc account opened by them on their becoming residents
controls.control_description:
(b) The Policy holder Indian residents who were outside India, and are the
beneficiaries of insurance claims/maturity or surrender value settled in
foreign currency in respect of policies issued by Insurer in India may be
permitted to credit the proceeds to the RFC Account opened by them on
their becoming residents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to credit the proceeds to the rfc account opened by them on their becoming residents

controls.control_objective: To ensure be paid only in rupees by credit to nro account of the beneficiary
controls.control_description:
(iv) Claims/maturity proceeds/ surrender value in respect of rupee life insurance
policies issued to Indians resident outside India for which premium have
been collected in non-repatriable rupees may be paid only in rupees by
credit to NRO account of the beneficiary.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be paid only in rupees by credit to nro account of the beneficiary

controls.control_objective: To ensure be paid in rupees or may be allowed to be remitted abroad
controls.control_description:
(v) Claims/maturity proceeds/ surrender value in respect of rupee policies issued
to foreign nationals not permanently resident in India may be paid in rupees
or may be allowed to be remitted abroad, if the claimant so desires.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be paid in rupees or may be allowed to be remitted abroad

controls.control_objective: To ensure pay commission to their agents who are permanently resident outside india regardless of the fact that part of the business booked by them may be on th
controls.control_description:
4.4 Commission to overseas Agents
Insurer in India may pay commission to their agents who are permanently
resident outside India regardless of the fact that part of the business booked by
them may be on the lives of persons resident in India and relative premium are
paid in rupees in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to pay commission to their agents who are permanently resident outside india regardless of the fact that part of the business booked by them may be on th

controls.control_objective: To ensure 3, 2000 relating to current account transactions as amended from time to time
controls.control_description:
381(E) dated May 3, 2000 relating to Current Account transactions as
amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 3, 2000 relating to current account transactions as amended from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure allow remittances falling due under such approved reinsurance arrangements by the insurer in accordance with the terms and conditions laid down by the
controls.control_description:
Authorised
dealers, designated by these insurance companies may allow remittances falling
due under such approved reinsurance arrangements by the insurer in
accordance with the terms and conditions laid down by their Boards.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to allow remittances falling due under such approved reinsurance arrangements by the insurer in accordance with the terms and conditions laid down by the

controls.control_objective: To ensure open, hold and maintain with a bank outside india foreign currency accounts for facilitating transactions and expenses relating /incidental to life in
controls.control_description:
4.6 Foreign Currency accounts
Insurer in India may open, hold and maintain with a bank outside India foreign
currency accounts for facilitating transactions and expenses relating /incidental to
life insurance business undertaken in foreign countries in accordance with the
above guidelines.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to open, hold and maintain with a bank outside india foreign currency accounts for facilitating transactions and expenses relating /incidental to life in

controls.control_objective: To ensure transfer to india regularly all surplus funds held at foreign centres and endeavour to keep in their foreign currency accounts only minimum balances r
controls.control_description:
Insurer in India should transfer to India regularly all surplus
funds held at foreign centres and endeavour to keep in their foreign currency
accounts only minimum balances required for normal business.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to transfer to india regularly all surplus funds held at foreign centres and endeavour to keep in their foreign currency accounts only minimum balances r

controls.control_objective: To ensure freely use its foreign currency balances for meeting all the normal expenses of its overseas offices inclusive of taxes and other dues in connection w
controls.control_description:
(i) Insurer in India may freely use its foreign currency balances for meeting all the
normal expenses of its overseas offices inclusive of taxes and other dues in
connection with maintenance and upkeep of buildings and properties held by
insurers in foreign countries as well as purchase of cars for official use.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to freely use its foreign currency balances for meeting all the normal expenses of its overseas offices inclusive of taxes and other dues in connection w

controls.control_objective: To ensure also freely use their overseas funds for settlement of provident fund, gratuity and other retirement benefits to retiring employees of overseas office
controls.control_description:
(ii) Insurer in India may also freely use their overseas funds for settlement of
provident fund, gratuity and other retirement benefits to retiring employees of
overseas offices.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also freely use their overseas funds for settlement of provident fund, gratuity and other retirement benefits to retiring employees of overseas office

controls.control_objective: To ensure grant loans, without prior permission of reserve bank, to employees of their overseas offices (other than indian nationals who had been deputed or pos
controls.control_description:
(iii) Insurer in India may grant loans, without prior permission of Reserve Bank, to
employees of their overseas offices (other than Indian nationals who had been
deputed or posted from India) against provident fund balances held in the
country concerned provided loan recoveries will be made in foreign currency.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to grant loans, without prior permission of reserve bank, to employees of their overseas offices (other than indian nationals who had been deputed or pos
